infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Used to get accurate prayer times for your location.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Used to set your profile picture.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Used to take your profile picture.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Life OS to use your location for accurate prayer times.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Life OS to access your photos to set a profile picture.
